parameters.text:
={{ "📥 *New " + $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.category + " email* — urgency " + $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.urgency + "/5

*From:* " + ($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.email_from || "unknown") + "
*Company:* " + ($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.company || "—") + "
*Subject:* " + ($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.email_subject || "(none)") + "
*What they want:* " + $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.intent + "

*Suggested reply (review before sending):*
>" + $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.draft_reply.replace(/
/g, "
>") + "

_Logged to Airtable as pending. Approve or edit the draft before replying._" }}

={{ "⚠️ *Triage failed — needs manual review*

*From:* " + ($json.email_from || "unknown") + "
*Subject:* " + ($json.email_subject || "(none)") + "
*Reason:* " + ($json.error_reason || "unknown error") + "

The AI response couldn't be validated, so nothing was written to Airtable. Please review this email manually." }}
